headline: FY2026 3rd straight >20% growth year ($4.92B rev, $1.77 EPS); historic AGI-CPU in-house silicon launch (Meta lead, Mar-2026) breaks neutrality but is supply-capped (~$1B vs >$2B demand); Arm LOST the Qualcomm litigation and now faces a fresh US FTC antitrust probe (opened 2026-05-15) plus EU/Korea; SoftBank ~87% owner deepens AI coupling via $500B Stargate and $6.5B Ampere buyout.
